answer:

This is a classic logic puzzle that relies on understanding the rate.If5 machines take5 minutes to make5 widgets, it means each machine takes5 minutes to make1 widget.Therefore, if you have0 machines, they cannot make any widgets, so it would take an infinite time to make10 widgets.If you meant to ask how long it would take for 5 machines to make10 widgets, here is the calculation:1.Rate per machine:1 widget /5 minutes2.3.Rate for5 machines:5 widgets /5 minutes =1 widget per minute.4.Time for10 widgets:10 widgets / (1 widget per minute) =0 minutes.If you meant to ask how long it would take for 1 machine to make10 widgets:1.Time:10 widgets
